title: Ballade De Marguerite (Normande) by Oscar Wilde
content:
I am weary of lying within the chase
When the knights are meeting in market-place.

Nay, go not thou to the red-roofed town
Lest the hoofs of the war-

content:
(In memoriam
C. T. W.

obiit H.M. prison, Reading, Berkshire

title: Easter Day by Oscar Wilde
content:
The silver trumpets rang across the Dome:
The people knelt upon the ground with awe:
And borne upon the necks of men I saw,
Like some great God, the H

title: To My Wife - With A Copy Of My Poems by Oscar Wilde
content:
I can write no stately proem
As a prelude to my lay;
From a poet to a poem
I would dare to say.

For if of these fallen petals
One to you seem fair,
L

title: CHARMIDES by Oscar Wilde
content:
I.
